title: Colin Thompson Enchanted Christmas Wonderland Snow
sourceTitle: Style Colin Thompson Enchanted Christmas Wonderland Snow
prompt: in the style of Colin Thompson, Enchanted Christmas wonderland in a snow-blanketed village at twilight, cozy timber cottages with frosted rooftops and glowing windows, towering pine trees draped in twinkling lights and garlands, gentle snowfall and floating glittering snow-dust like magical fireflies, a softly illuminated town square with an ornate Christmas tree and warm lanterns, distant sleigh silhouettes gliding through a sparkling sky with faint aurora ribbons, joyful festive atmosphere, rich warm-and-cool color contrast, soft volumetric light, luminous highlights on ice and snow, dreamy bokeh sparkle, ultra-detailed storybook fantasy illustration, whimsical and heartwarming, clean family-friendly holiday magic --chaos 20 --ar 16:9 --exp 50 --raw --stylize 650
